target_query: mba in logistics and supply chain management

hero.art_prompt: Vikram, a 29 year old Indian man in smart-casual with a safety-friendly professional look, confident, overseeing an organised modern warehouse with shelves, aspirational and capable.

panels.narration: Vikram was already good at keeping operations moving at work.
panels.dialogue: I kept everything moving on time.
panels.img_prompt: Vikram, 29, confidently coordinating an organised modern warehouse, capable and focused, clean industrial setting.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA he did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I run the whole chain?
panels.img_prompt: Vikram looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from supervising to leading the whole supply chain, tablet in hand, warehouse.

panels.narration: Then he found an online MBA in Logistics & Supply Chain Management.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Vikram's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Vikram enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Vikram confidently starting his first supply chain lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Logistics & Supply Chain Management
points: Master the real craft: supply chain design, procurement, warehousing and global logistics.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.

testimonials.name: Vikram Das
testimonials.quote: I kept things moving. This MBA turned that into a real supply chain leadership path.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: Learning procurement and global logistics made me ready to lead, not just supervise.

testimonials.name: Imran Ali
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI let me upskill while running a busy warehouse full time.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised MBA plus real supply chain skills got me into a management role.

facts.v: Supply chain design, procurement, warehousing and global logistics
0% interest EMI from about ₹8,333/month, or an education loan
